page_settings.meta_description: Accelerate your product roadmap with Solbion's Lab-as-a-Service. Collapse 6-month sequential material screening campaigns into a two-week automated run.

layout_structure.layout: Centered alignment, bold typography maximizing screen real estate. Background features a fast-moving, high-contrast data cascade.

content.headline: Accelerate materials discovery.
content.subheadline: Accelerate your R&D pipelines. Collapse months of traditional trial-and-error into a rapid automated campaign, gaining the optimized formulation and a full map of the search space.

secondary_cta.label: See How We Protect Your IP

layout_structure.layout: Three-column grid showcasing hard ROI metrics and business value. Heavy numerical emphasis.

metrics.label: Speed-to-Data
metrics.description: Avoid large upfront CapEx. Partner with our automated platform to screen hundreds of material variations per week, keeping your focus on core product design.

metrics.label: Cost Reduction per Formulation
metrics.description: Standardized process automation and parallelized metrology lower the barrier to discovering and validating new thin-films and coatings.

metrics.label: Negative Space Mapped
metrics.description: We believe failure is a vital scientific step. A complete map of the search space boundaries helps you understand behavior limits and guides future research.

layout_structure.layout: High-contrast dual-zone layout. Left side (Client Zone) highlighted in white/grey; Right side (Solbion Zone) highlighted with Deep Teal accents.

content.body: We align our discovery platform with your product goals. Our split-IP agreements are designed to respect and secure your ownership while keeping general workflows open and collaborative.

details: The specific, optimized composition of matter (e.g., the exact ternary alloy ratio or barrier layer recipe).
Full patent rights to manufacture and commercialize the discovered material.
Exclusive access to the finalized material performance report.
Anonymized machine telemetry and baseline process curves.
The 'negative space' failure data used to train our foundational models.
The active learning algorithms and digital twin software architectures used during the campaign.

layout_structure.layout: Four-step horizontal pipeline with progressive Deep Teal highlight states.

content.header: From Hypothesis to IP in Weeks

steps.description: We establish the chemical boundaries and the precise target metrics (e.g., thermal expansion, electrical conductivity, sub-5nm uniformity).
Our automated platform executes rapid combinatorial spreads, synthesizing up to 500 physical variations per week.
Closed-loop metrology feeds data back to the AI, which autonomously narrows the search field to zero in on the top 5% of candidates.
You receive the physical recipe for the winning candidate and a machine-readable JSON dataset mapping the entire campaign for your internal ML teams.

layout_structure.layout: Solid off-white block container floating centered inside a clean viewport.

content.body: Whether you are a deep-tech spinout scaleup or an established enterprise team, we can design high-throughput experiments to de-risk your development path together.
